54:53.english: And every small and great thing is recorded.
54:53.score_notes: Ultra-short (4 words). From Surah Al-Qamar. Pairs kabir with its opposite saghir — reinforces the form in the sharpest possible contrast.

lesson_use.english: Every small and great thing is recorded
lesson_use.notes: Ultra-short recall. Pairs kabir with its antonym saghir — one of the clearest ways to reinforce the L1 form.
